contents: {a=Person_Pixel}Pixel{a} has moved next to {a=Location_PoisonApple}The Poison Apple{a} in {a=Location_FarFarAway}Far Far Away{a}.

{a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{a} discovered that his external storage drive has remained functional and connected to the computer, despite the cable being disconnected. A working theory is that the drive was utilizing black magic to sustain itself.

{a=Person_Ritikl}Dr Ritikl{a} was called up to {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi's{a} apartment. His roommate, {a=Person_Tokxi}Frankie{a}, suffered a totally unexplainable battery acid attack that he had nothing to do with. Ritikl examined Frankie's mouth and discovered that he now has a mouth infection. Ritikl tried finding his {a=Product_TokxiMagicalGreenJuice}Tokxi's magical green juice{a}, but could only find their {a=Product_FeelingHornyGas}feeling-horny gas{a}. Before he could use it, Frankie inexplicably began feeling better. He then quickly left to input his government ID into PornHub to watch F1 races.

{a=Person_KSI}KSI{a}, {a=Person_LoganPaul}Logan Paul{a}, and {a=Person_MrBeast}Mr. Beast{a} announced their new box for the Lunchly line of products called {a=Product_CraigEggyGummiesLunchly}Craig eggy gummies Lunchly{a}. This box contains a {a=Product_DarkChocolateFeastables}dark chocolate (like Ritikl's underpants dark) Feastables{a}, {a=Product_NovaNuts}Nova nuts{a}, and {a=Product_CherryPopperPrime}cherry popper Prime{a}. These Lunchlies are totally safe and not poisonous enough to kill a child.
{a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} confessed that he has an interest in blue balls.

{a=Person_Rick}Rick{a} found a new date on the online forum {a=App_FuckDemCraigs}FuckDemCraigs.com{a}. He described them as "She's kind, she's bitchy, she's incredibly addicted to beanie beans". {a=Person_V1}V1{a}, his roommate, reluctantly followed along whilst wielding his piercing slab revolver. After the date arrived and revealed that they them a furry seraphim, V1 excused her outside and proceeded to shoot Rick out of the house.

{a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} and {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a} got lost whilst going out on a camping trip. Nova foraged for 4 hours and found some food, water, and a lot of giant horse cock dildos. He stole a large supply of {a=Product_Pibb}Pibb{a} from other survivors. Ritikl, However, found an old bar and returned extremely intoxicated. He was so drunk, he grilled a penguin, stuck it on the end of a spear that was meant for catching fish, and called it a kebab.

{a=Person_JoeBeanie}Joe Beanie{a} booked for a hospital appointment to get an X-ray. {a=Person_Ritikl}Dr Ritikl{a} performed the procedure and presented the findings to them. He declared that they had virginity on their punctured urethra. Ritikl referenced, from a book called "Real Doctor Book", that it has to be removed to prevent the spreading of the virginity. He then suddenly distracted from the situation by wanting to talk about how he nearly died to a lemon pledge. But, the attempt was shut down so Ritikl peddled directly into charging one billion dollars. The nurse entered the office and noticed that Dr. Ritikl was not {a=Person_DoctorCom}Doctor.com{a}, who entered after them. Ritikl quickly fled the seen and began practicing in another hospital down the road. Doctor.com quelled Joe's worries and told them they just have a low blood supply and that they should book another appointment for a blood transfusion.

{a=Person_Rick}Rick{a} found another date on a game called {a=Media_BonersAndStoners}Boners and Stoners{a} for the {a=Product_NovaBox690}Nova Box 690{a}. He described them as "She's kind, she's being a dick, she's incredibly nose picky". {a=Person_TimRobotnik}Tim{a}, his new roommate, reluctantly followed along whilst wielding a bread knife. After the date arrived and revealed that they were a femboy {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} clone, Tim excused them outside and proceeded to try and stab Rick.

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} sold some virginities from {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} clones to setup a fortune-telling shop. His first customers were {a=Person_Sonar}Sonar{a} and {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a}, after they were teased with a mamagen. They were hesitant to start, until Craig offered a tarot card reading on the house. The first card was "The Lovers": partnerships, duality, and union. Only that card was free, however. They still had to pay £69,069 for the rest. Ritikl only had pencils at the time, but Craig accepted it. The second was "The Wheel of Fortune": change, cycles, and inevitable fate. The third card was "The Prostitute Licking Smeg": death. Sonar and Ritikl begin feeling very suspicious. Then, all of a sudden, the FBI arrested Craig for scamming couples with a lovers-only tarot deck.

{a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a} was accidentally spotted with a lack of any attire, in public. They immediately began deflecting the blame onto {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{a}, when they were getting socially shame.

{a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a} was dropped at the local bank, by their mum in a flatbed truck. They were trying to, politely, rob the bank with a {a=Product_FizzSprayer}fizz-sprayer{a} that has been painted to look like a shotgun. They initially wanted to use a {a=Weapon_BendAFingerBlasterPoppetCoffee}Bend-a-finger Blaster Poppet's Coffee{a} but quickly realized it was too excessive. The guards were visibly confused from the situation. Aheko explained that their 10 year old cat, called "Fucking Cat", needs therapy. Their previous owner was {a=Person_ShaneDawson}Shane Dawson{a} and they got jump-scared by the toaster popping. Whilst one of guards was calling for the cops, another guard distracted Aheko by offering coffee. They wanted a Latte with 3 pumps of chocolate, 1 pump of caramel, and a hint of mint. But, the coffee machine only did black so they instead got one with 2 sugars. The first guard came back handing them $67 in nickles and a receipt, for tax reasons, then let the go. After Aheko left the bank, they were immediately chased down the street by 4 cop cars and an armored police van.
Shortly after, the CCTV footage of the whole situation was then posted to TikTok and gained around 150k views.

The CCTV footage that was uploaded to TikTok

{a=Person_ModellingCock420ShitSinger}ModellingCock420ShitSinger{a} was streaming Among Us on twitch. after Aheko_Megabyte donated $89 to their channel, their younger brother named Nova runs in, covers the camera, and then begs to play. ModellingCock excused their viewers whilst they kicked him out. Users in chat was a little confused, with PixelDanteOfUndion saying "bro who was that child". Nova called for the mother about them being mean. Users in chat was still observing the situation, with Aheko_Megabyte responding "wild stream today fr". Suddenly, a terminator was at the front door looking for ModellingCock. Aheko_Dante in chat responded "damn who called the fuzz". ModellingCock was getting arrested for illegally downloading a microwave, a {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a}, and a panzer online. The family was in shock. They escaped the scene and the terminator chased after them. They have been on the run ever since. The final message in chat was by PixelDanteOfUndion, saying "ok bye i guess". Before the stream ended, Nova let slip that they paid that terminator $89.

{a=Person_IvoRobotnik}Dr. Robotnik{a} took his adopted son, Timmy, along for a camping trip. When they were at the campfire cooking up some s'mores, Robotnik told Timmy about his tale of the handsome beast.

"This all started way back when I still had all of my hair. I used to crank one out to Pixel's morning stars. Then I got really bored. I got so bored that, one day, I decided to go fishing. I met a big purple cat. Then I got on my sweet-tooth, with my fishing rod in hand, and set sale. 2 hours of fishing and I ain't caught nothing. Double negative, which means i did catch something. So I was about to pack up, when something caught my eye. It was this handsome beast in the woods. And, when I tell you how handsome this beast was, it couldn't be compared. Never before have I felt gay, before staring at this beast. So me and this thing were just staring at each other. When, all of a sudden, I was reaching for my nineteen inches of venom. Which is what i call my penar back in the day. It breed me, Timmy! It breed me! [To escape] I had to masturbate. It ain't like I had much of an option. You simple-minded, half-butter-eaten, smelly-toed, four-eyed, yeast-sneezing boy."

Eggman was cut-off by a sound of a twig snapping nearby. Robotnik rushed to keep Timmy protected. Then, from deep within the woods, the handsome beast that bred Robotnik emerged. The beast told them that their name was Santa Clause and they did not appreciate their attitude. Robotnik started to become really horny again. They were making a lot of sexual gestures and Santa threatened them with cracking them open and frying them. Robotnik pulls out his anime sword. He has been training for the last 89 weeks, to take them down in revenge. Santa pulls out a gun. Robotnik realized he was severely unprepared, before getting shot in the testicles. Santa then threw Timmy 2 miles down range and rushed off to meet up with Bee.
A new disease, known as "the flu disease", has been rapidly spreading. The disease was discovered in 2001 and was deemed a threat on 13th December 2025.

{a=Person_Jerry}Jerry{a}, on {a=Media_CreggSchnews}Cregg Schnews{a}, was reporting on the outbreak. He cut to Luna, the street reporter in {a=Location_Arkansaw}Arkansaw{a}. {a=Person_Loona}Loona{a} Interviewed someone she found on the street, colloquially know as {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a}. He said that "This is nothing compared to when an adult said 6 7. When I heard an adult say 6 7, I was never myself anymore. I went 67 days with no sleep." After Luna told him that 89 people died, he told her that he killed people before and has been on the run for 89,227,632 years. He then killed Luna on live television. {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a}, the nearby cop, noticed the murder and began chasing down Craig. Another cop entered the Cregg Schnews studio and gave a warning to all viewers to lock their doors and cover their windows. Craig then suddenly appears at the studio and kills Jerry.

{a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{a} trapped {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a} in his grill and roasted him alive. He said that the taste was "interesting". During {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx's{a} grieving and yelling at him, Ritikl suddenly appeared and shocked both of them. They revealed that they took a page from {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova's{a} book and cloned themselves. They have not disclosed how many clones have been made, however.
{a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a} has received a very anime-looking katana for Christmas.

header: Craig's My Little Pony Island Adventure 2 launch
contents: Craig did a partnership with My Little Pony to be a part of the new game called {a=Media_CraigMyLittlePonyIslandAdventure2}Craig's My Little Pony Island Adventure 2{a} released for the {a=Product_NovaBox960}Nova Box 690{a}.

There has been a local outbreak of space aids at {a=Location_Craigville}Craigville{a}. The stages of space aids include: rashes on the epiglottis, uncontrollably shouting "le gasp", and then your nose falling off and running away. A good way to feel better is to rub some {a=Product_CraigCumSkincareCream}Craig Cum Skincare Cream{a} on your epiglottis and drink 696,969L of vodka a day.

header: End of Craig's Cum Jam Canners
contents: {a=Organisation_CraigCumJamCanners}Craig's Cum Jam Canners{a} was a world famous rock band with millions of fans. They recently broke up after some drama between {a=Person_JonLemon}Jon Lemon{a} and {a=Person_PolkaMcFartney}Polka McFartney{a}. Lemon was late for the recording session, as he was finishing his goon session. They were finishing the track before the expected release date in 2 weeks. He brought his new girlfriend, {a=Person_LokoOhno}Loko Oh-no{a}, along with him. The rest of the band did not approve of him bringing in. This wasn't the first time this happened, however. Because, last time, he brought in his {a=Person_UncleLemon}creepy uncle{a}. This time, however, Lemon wanted to drop McFartney's base solo to give Loko Oh-no a verse. He reluctantly accepted. McFartney became very furious, after realizing that Oh-no can not sing. He quickly stop the recording and began arguing with Lemon. {a=Person_Garrison}Garrison{a} Tried to break up the fight and remind them of the past. But Lemon and McFartney decided to leave the band. McFartney released their own album of a mix between funk and grunge they call "frunge". Lemon and Oh-no began singing folk music at nursing homes. Garrison and {a=Person_Apple}Apple{a} tried to continue the band themselves.

{a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} was hired by the video game mascot, {a=Media_DemocraticBugGirl}Democratic Bug Girl{a}, to create {a=Media_HalfLife3}Half-Life 3{a} and rekindle their popularity. The game would contain an unskippable cutscene with an annoying song, a waffle stomp, and making {a=Product_CraigCumJam}Craig Cum Jam{a}.

{a=Person_JoeBeanie}Joe Beanie{a} was arrested for the murder of {a=Person_BenedictCumberbatch}Benedict Cumberbatch{a}. On 24th May 2025, Beanie was meant to be at a premier. Yet, nobody saw him that day. Cumberbatch's also had the same signature as Beanie's. He was arrested outside his local {a=Location_DildoShopsAndFishySmells}Dildo Shops and Fishy Smells{a}, next to {a=Location_RitiklSpicyPineappleShoppe}Ritikl's Spicy Pineapple Shoppe{a}, whilst looking for some latex condoms.

{a=Person_Poppet}Poppet{a} was mysteriously cloned by an unknown entity. {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a} tried interrogating them both, to find the original. But they couldn't make any progress. Eventually, one of the Poppets decided to create an agreement: They would do whatever Aheko requested, so they can live. Aheko agreed and made their request. They then shot the other Poppet in the kneecaps and the Ritikl funny bone.
